creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Attention:

While waiting for the blocking GitLab 7.x to come into the Portstree a new major version was released (as every month)...

Currently i'm waiting for 7.x to come into the port and will than update this PR to the current GitLab version. In the meantime new dependencies comes but some will be (or are already) removed. A short look shows at least one of the Rubygems needed by GitLab 8.0 is already removed for 8.1. 

So nothing to do here until the blocker is done.
